findings.description: Candidate rules completely omit typographic requirements for Agenda and Nunito Sans despite clear source rules specifying layout hierarchy (headlines vs. body copy) and links.

payload.description: Use Agenda for all headlines and headers, and Nunito Sans for all print body copy, using the designated Google Font URL.

findings.description: The specific SVG shape geometry, path rendering, and color gradient treatment for Call To Actions (CTAs) is unrepresented in the candidate rules.

payload.description: CTAs must utilize the approved asymmetrical rounded path geometry and linear gradient fill (#FFDF55 to #FAA21B) defined in the system SVG.
